\section{Introduction}

This is the main file content on page one. It provides an overview of the entire
document and sets the stage for the chapters that follow. The purpose of this
project is to demonstrate how multiple input files interact with SyncTeX
forward and inverse search capabilities.

We will explore several topics across different chapters, each stored in its
own separate file and included via the input command. This approach is standard
practice for large LaTeX documents such as theses, books, and technical reports.

\input{input_files/chapter_one}
